name: Stink Bomb
description: Being a skunk, Stink Bomb can really 'light the fuse' on his enemies, releasing a cloud of smelly vapor which damages enemies and renders him invisible. He can also throw ninja stars and perform a devastating One-Inch Palm which knocks back and poisons his foes. With certain upgrades, he can also launch nauseous acorns at enemies. Nauseated enemies turn green and take damage over a short period of time.
biography: Stink Bomb studied martial arts under one of the greatest ninja masters in history, who believed that surprise was the key to finding your true self. Thus, his master would constantly jump out and frighten him, hoping that it would scare Stink Bomb into finding his innermost strength. On one such occasion, Stink Bomb was so surprised that he instinctively released a cloud of vapor so pungent that it caused his master to disappear and never return. With this newly discovered ability, Stink Bomb developed his own form of martial arts known as Kung Fume, and wandered the land teaching it to all those who wished to learn. It was not long before the news (and smell) of this new form reached Master Eon, who sought out the young ninja at once.
personality: Resilient Stink Bomb didn't let his master's disappearance put him down. He developed the martial art Kung Fume and wandered Skylands teaching its whiffy ways. Like all Life Skylanders, Stink Bomb prefers to keep his feet on the ground.

story.content: Stink Bomb, Spyro and Ninjini were battling a group of Drow when Hugo called upon them to help Stealth Elf, Pop Fizz and Wash Buckler at Radiant Isles. Unfortunately they weren't able to assist as they were busy handling the Drow situation.

content: A fun place to sneak around.
A rose by any other name!

trivia: Stink Bomb is similar to Stealth Elf, notably due to both Skylanders being ninjas, turn invisible and possess similar clothing.
He's also the second ninja Skylander (first being Stealth Elf, third being Lob-Star).
Whenever his top half is placed on the Portal of Power, a classic ninja theme with an ancient Japanese flute can be heard playing in the background.
Developer Rob Gallerani comments, 'I love Stink Bomb for the sheer number of meetings we had to have about the sound of his fart attack.'
His voice actor, Tom Kenny, is best known for portraying SpongeBob SquarePants, The Ice King from Adventure Time, and is the current voice of Spyro in his main video game series.
He and Night Shift are seen in most of the commercials of Swap Force, including the intro of the game. They're always seen swapping with each other.
Stink Bomb can stay invisible longer than Trap Shadow even after attacking.
Everytime Stink Bomb disappears while wearing a hat, his headwear vanishes as well.
Unlike real skunks, his stinky smell is portrayed as farting.
Whenever his bottom half gets upgraded, the color of his belt changes, which is a reference to the martial arts ranking.
His One-Inch Palm ability is a pun of Bruce Lee's One-Inch Punch.
His Soul Gem description states his top half ability is 'Tri-Star Technique' in some media, though in-game it is 'Master-Star Technique'.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Stink Bomb (Clear the Air)
Skylanders Swap Force - Stink Bomb Soul Gem Preview (Clear the Air)

gameplay: Stink Bomb utilizes stealth and status effects to control the battlefield. He can vanish into a skunk cloud, leaving enemies confused while he strikes from the shadows with ninja stars or his powerful One-Inch Palm. His upgrades allow him to specialize in either his martial arts and projectiles or his deceptive cloud-based abilities, including the use of poison-tipped acorns.

basic.name: Skunk-Fu Stars
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to throw small stars that can damage enemies at a long range.

basic.name: Skunk Cloud
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to go invisible and damage enemies with a large obscuring cloud.

basic_upgrades.name: One-Inch Palm
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to deliver a powerful palm attack that knocks away enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Noxious Ninja
basic_upgrades.content: Press (Attack 1) to throw Skunk-Fu Stars that do increased damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Sweeping Skunk Fu
basic_upgrades.content: Hold (Attack 1) to charge handfuls of Skunk-Fu Stars, release to damage enemies in all directions.

basic_upgrades.name: Hidden Tail
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 while invisible to perform a tail attack that does a large amount of damage to enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Sporting Stripes
basic_upgrades.content: Speed is increased. The sport edition is always faster.

basic_upgrades.name: Skunking Around
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to go invisible and leave a skunk cloud on the ground that damages enemies.

soulgems.name: Master-Star Technique
soulgems.content: Press Attack 1 to throw Master Stars that have a higher chance to critically hit!

soulgems.name: Stealth Skunk
soulgems.content: Remain invisible even after attacking enemies.

abilities.name: Skunk-Fu Shield
abilities.content: Sweeping Skunk-Fu creates a whirling shield that damages nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Acorn Accuracy
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 to charge a powerful poisoned acorn, release to shoot it at enemies.

abilities.name: Skunk Eye
abilities.content: An ancient aiming technique makes acorn attacks do increased damage.

abilities.name: Rolling Fog
abilities.content: Up to two skunk clouds can be active at one time.

abilities.name: Cloudy Concoction
abilities.content: Skunk cloud does increased damage. What a funky skunk!

abilities.name: Sneaky Tactics
abilities.content: Move forward slowly to cause pointy objects to be left that slow and damage enemies.

abilities.name: Pain in the Foot
abilities.content: Sneaky Tactics does increased damage. Tough acting sneaking action!
